one_line_positioning: AI Product Builder who ships data-driven products from zero to scale
narrative_angle: Co-founder and AI engineer with strong data analytics background, pivoting to product management with a focus on data-driven decision making and cross-functional execution
proof_points_to_emphasize: Co-founded Emote, built product from 0→1→iteration, scaled to 450+ users, improved activation from 20% to 75% and retention from 5% to 13-15%
Reduced inference latency from 15s to 3s and cost from $1.20 to $0.023 through pipeline optimization
Built production multi-agent AI system for enterprise quality management at Omnex Systems
things_to_downplay: Lack of formal product management title
tone_guidance: Confident, data-focused, outcome-oriented; acknowledge domain gap but emphasize transferable skills
recruiter_first_impression_target: A builder who uses data to drive product decisions and can ship iteratively
reasoning: Strong fit on data-driven decision making and cross-functional collaboration, but missing e-commerce and design thinking. Position as a product-minded builder with proven ability to launch and iterate products. Domain gap is a risk but can be mitigated by highlighting startup agility and data skills.
